subject: [PATCH 19/24] nfsd: allow encoding a filehandle into fattr4 without a svc_fh

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch allows the encoding of a filehandle into fattr4 without requiring a svc_fh. It achieves this by adding a new 'fhandle' field to struct nfsd4_fattr_args and copying the filehandle into it from the svc_fh in CB_NOTIFY callbacks. This change enables the encoding of filehandles in scenarios where a svc_fh is not available, such as in CB_NOTIFY callbacks.
